requirements.name: instruction on deployment
requirements.description: correctly prompt users when a project does not require deployment, REQ threads are completed at merged. and when a project needs deployment, /worktree-merge will notify the user that they still need to complete until deployed.
requirements.notes: Add requiresDeployment project flag; worktree-merge conditionally auto-completes or reminds about deployment

requirements.name: Review follow-up: update agent docs for deployment-conditional transitions
requirements.description: Source: code-review of REQ-1775716475. Severity: MEDIUM. Evidence: (1) work-on.prompt.md lifecycle map hard-codes MERGED→DEPLOYED without noting that MERGED is terminal when requiresDeployment=false — /work-on would erroneously try to advance past a terminal state. (2) orchestrator.agent.md state transitions show MERGED→DEPLOYED unconditionally. Required outcome: add deployment-conditional notes to both files so agents know MERGED can be terminal when requiresDeployment=false.
requirements.notes: Doc-only: add deployment-conditional notes to work-on.prompt.md and orchestrator.agent.md

requirements.name: rollback function
requirements.description: add a rolling back command to allow users to restore the project code to the point where a REQ is not yet merged
requirements.notes: New script rollback-requirement.sh to git-revert a REQ merge commit and restore manifest states to pre-merge

requirements.name: enhance e2e test skill
requirements.description: introduce screenshot-based cross-border test capability for /e2e-test skill
requirements.notes: Extend e2e-test.prompt.md with screenshot capture at UI borders, baseline diffing, and conditional skip for non-UI projects. Depends on REQ-1775120162.
